detectors.description:
MDXToken.setOwner(address)._newOwner (MDXToken.sol#629) lacks a zero-check on :

Reentrancy in MDXToken.refundTokens(address,address,uint256) (MDXToken.sol#709-721):
	External calls:
	- token.transfer(_refund,_value) (MDXToken.sol#717)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- RefundTokens(_token,_refund,_value) (MDXToken.sol#719)
detectors.markdown:

	- [token.transfer(_refund,_value)](MDXToken.sol#L717)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [RefundTokens(_token,_refund,_value)](MDXToken.sol#L719)
